notes: This directory is the authoritative staged golden ISA definition for v0.56.2.
v0.56.2 is the live canonical LinxISA profile for this repository.
v0.56.2 expands tile register depth to 16 per hand, uses dynamic tile capacity descriptors, and replaces B.IOT/B.CATR/B.DATR with B.IOT plus B.CATR/B.DATR.
Historical pre-v0.56 profile material is removed from active repository surfaces after this profile validates.
